title: NextStepDecision
description: Structured output for the LLM next-step call. The LLM reasons over recorded metrics and proposes exactly one constrained action. Python validates this before use and never executes LLM-supplied code.

action.description: The single next action to take.

model_name.description: Proposed model; MUST be on the Python-side allowlist. May be empty when action is expand_dataset or stop.

hyperparameters.description: Proposed hyperparameter config (JSON only). Validated by Python before any training.

reason.description: Short rationale for the chosen action.
